mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, create_user_id, icon_img, code, `name`, price, mdt_synopsis,content, `status`, is_delete, `index`, register_price, hospital, moderator, contact_way
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_mdt SET `index` = `index` + 1 WHERE id IN
#{ids}
mapper.select: SELECT a.`name` AS mdtName ,a.`index` AS mdtIndex ,a.`status` AS mdtStatus ,a.content AS mdtContent, c.`name` AS tagName , a.id AS mdtId, c.id AS tagId FROM t_mdt a LEFT JOIN t_mdt_tag b ON a.id = b.mdt_id LEFT JOIN d_mdt_tag c ON b.tag_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.id ,a.`name`,a.doctor_type,b.is_combination,a.papers_numbers idCard FROM t_doctor_user a LEFT JOIN t_doctor_set b ON a.id = b.doctor_user_id WHERE a.is_cancel = 0 AND a.`status` = 1 AND a.is_auth = 'PASS' AND b.is_mdt = 1

SELECT a.`name` AS mdtName ,a.`index` AS mdtIndex ,a.`status` AS mdtStatus , c.`name` AS tagName , a.id AS mdtId, c.id AS tagId FROM t_mdt a LEFT JOIN t_mdt_tag b ON a.id = b.mdt_id LEFT JOIN d_mdt_tag c ON b.tag_id = c.id
c.is_delete = 0
AND a.`name` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{map.name},'%')
ORDER BY mdtIndex ASC
